description: Create visualization showing sequence similarity matrix and GGG motif alignment comparing PMTs vs spermidine synthases
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create a visualization of the key diagnostic differences

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 6))

# Panel A: Sequence similarity heatmap
ax1 = axes[0]
names = ['NaPMT3', 'NaPMT1', 'NtPMT1', 'DsPMT', 'HsSPDS', 'AtSPDS1']

# K-mer similarities (computed earlier, k=3 cosine)
import math

def compute_kmer_cosine(seq1, seq2, k=3):
    kmers1 = {}
    for i in range(len(seq1)-k+1):
        kmer = seq1[i:i+k]
        kmers1[kmer] = kmers1.get(kmer, 0) + 1
    kmers2 = {}
    for i in range(len(seq2)-k+1):
        kmer = seq2[i:i+k]
        kmers2[kmer] = kmers2.get(kmer, 0) + 1
    all_k = set(kmers1.keys()) | set(kmers2.keys())
    dot = sum(kmers1.get(k, 0) * kmers2.get(k, 0) for k in all_k)
    n1 = math.sqrt(sum(v*v for v in kmers1.values()))
    n2 = math.sqrt(sum(v*v for v in kmers2.values()))
    return dot / (n1 * n2) if n1 * n2 > 0 else 0

import requests
accessions = {
    "NaPMT3": "A0A314LG79", "NaPMT1": "Q93XQ5", "NtPMT1": "Q42963",
    "DsPMT": "Q70EW6", "HsSPDS": "P19623", "AtSPDS1": "Q9ZUB3",
}
sequences = {}
for name, acc in accessions.items():
    url = f"https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/{acc}.fasta"
    resp = requests.get(url, headers={"User-Agent": "OpenScientist/1.0"}, timeout=30)
    lines = resp.text.strip().split('\n')
    sequences[name] = ''.join(lines[1:])

n = len(names)
sim_matrix = np.zeros((n, n))
for i in range(n):
    for j in range(n):
        if i == j:
            sim_matrix[i][j] = 1.0
        else:
            sim_matrix[i][j] = compute_kmer_cosine(sequences[names[i]], sequences[names[j]])

im = ax1.imshow(sim_matrix, cmap='RdYlBu_r', vmin=0, vmax=1, aspect='auto')
ax1.set_xticks(range(n))
ax1.set_xticklabels(names, rotation=45, ha='right', fontsize=9)
ax1.set_yticks(range(n))
ax1.set_yticklabels(names, fontsize=9)

# Add text annotations
for i in range(n):
    for j in range(n):
        color = 'white' if sim_matrix[i][j] > 0.7 or sim_matrix[i][j] < 0.2 else 'black'
        ax1.text(j, i, f'{sim_matrix[i][j]:.2f}', ha='center', va='center', 
                color=color, fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

# Add dividing lines between PMT and SPDS groups
ax1.axhline(y=3.5, color='red', linewidth=2, linestyle='--')
ax1.axvline(x=3.5, color='red', linewidth=2, linestyle='--')

# Add group labels
ax1.text(1.5, -0.8, 'PMTs', ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='darkgreen')
ax1.text(4.5, -0.8, 'SPDSs', ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='darkred')

plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax1, label='Sequence Similarity (k-mer cosine)', shrink=0.8)
ax1.set_title('A. Sequence Similarity Matrix', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Panel B: GGG motif alignment showing key differences
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.axis('off')

# Create text-based alignment visualization
ggg_seqs = {
    'NaPMT3': ('IPNPKKVLIIGGGIGFTLFEMLR', 'PMT', 'darkgreen'),
    'NaPMT1': ('IPNPKKVLIIGGGIGFTLFEMLR', 'PMT', 'green'),
    'NtPMT1': ('IPNPKKVLIIGGGIGFTLFEMLR', 'PMT', 'limegreen'),
    'DsPMT':  ('IPNPKKVLIIGGGIGFTLFEVLR', 'PMT', 'olivedrab'),
    'HsSPDS': ('HPNPRKVLIIGGGDGGVLREVVK', 'SPDS', 'darkred'),
    'AtSPDS1':('IPNPKKVLVIGGGDGGVLREVAR', 'SPDS', 'red'),
}

ax2.text(0.5, 0.98, 'B. GGG Motif Region Alignment', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold',
         ha='center', va='top', transform=ax2.transAxes)
ax2.text(0.5, 0.92, '(Cofactor binding site - diagnostic for PMT vs SPDS)',
         ha='center', va='top', fontsize=9, style='italic', transform=ax2.transAxes)

y_pos = 0.82
for name, (seq, group, color) in ggg_seqs.items():
    label = f'{name:8s} ({group:4s}): '
    ax2.text(0.05, y_pos, label, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace',
             color=color, fontweight='bold', transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center')
    
    # Color each residue - highlight diagnostic positions
    x_start = 0.42
    for i, aa in enumerate(seq):
        # Diagnostic positions (0-indexed in the motif): 13(D/I), 14(G/G), 15(G/F), 16(V/T)
        if i in [13, 14, 15, 16]:  # After GGG, the divergent positions
            bg_color = 'yellow' if group == 'PMT' else 'lightyellow'
            fontw = 'bold'
        elif i in [10, 11, 12]:  # GGG conserved
            bg_color = 'lightcyan'
            fontw = 'bold'
        else:
            bg_color = None
            fontw = 'normal'
        
        ax2.text(x_start + i*0.024, y_pos, aa, fontsize=10, fontfamily='monospace',
                color=color, fontweight=fontw, transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center',
                bbox=dict(boxstyle='square,pad=0.1', facecolor=bg_color, edgecolor='none') if bg_color else {})
    
    y_pos -= 0.10

# Add legend
ax2.text(0.05, 0.15, 'Key: PMTs have ...GGG·IG·FTLFE... (methyl transfer from SAM)',
         fontsize=9, transform=ax2.transAxes, color='darkgreen')
ax2.text(0.05, 0.08, '     SPDSs have ...GGG·DG·GVLRE... (aminopropyl transfer from dcSAM)',
         fontsize=9, transform=ax2.transAxes, color='darkred')
ax2.text(0.05, 0.01, '     Cyan = conserved GGG; Yellow = PMT-specific substitutions',
         fontsize=9, transform=ax2.transAxes, color='gray')

plt.suptitle('NaPMT3 is a Putrescine N-methyltransferase, NOT a Spermidine Synthase',
             fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', y=1.02)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('active_site_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: active_site_comparison.png")
